Description: Nullifying status afflictions that can be removed by **Purify**, as well as knockback and draw-in effects.
HP recovery via healing actions is increased. Status afflictions that can be removed by **Purify**, as well as knockback and draw-in effects, are nullified.
Transfiguration magicks have changed your form. Unable to execute actions.
Transfiguration magicks have changed your form. Unable to execute actions and damage taken is increased.
Highly sensitive to the plentiful glimmer of Archon eggs.
Probability of gleaning Archon eggs is increased.
Highly sensitive to the plentiful glimmer of gold Archon eggs.
Probability of gleaning Archon eggs is increased, and all eggs gleaned will be gold.

Name: Curse of Solitude

Description: Covered in accursed fire powder, resulting in an intense explosion when this effect expires.

Name: Curse of Immolation
Description: Beset by rising heat, resulting in fire damage when this effect expires. Contact with ice-aspected attacks will remove this effect.
